SEARCH
Package com.example.restapi.service

Class AppUserService

java.lang.Object
com.example.restapi.service.AppUserService
@Service public class AppUserService extends Object
Service layer for user authentication and profile management. Acts as a remote facade that delegates identity operations to Supabase Auth while keeping local profile data in the application database.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AppUserService(ProfileRepository profileRepository)
    Constructs AppUserService.

    Method

  • Constructor Details

    • AppUserService

      public AppUserService(ProfileRepository profileRepository)
      Constructs AppUserService.
      Parameters:
      profileRepository - Repository for local user profiles.

  • Method Details

    • register

      public Profile register(RegisterRequest req)
      Registers a new user in Supabase Auth and creates a local profile.
      Parameters:
      req - Registration data (email, password, username, phone).
      Returns:
      The persisted local Profile.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if Supabase signup fails or the username is already taken.

    • login

      public AuthResponse login(String email, String password)
      Authenticates a user against Supabase and returns session data.
      Parameters:
      email - User email.
      password - User password.
      Returns:
      AuthResponse containing the access token and local profile.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if credentials are invalid or the email is not confirmed.

    • resendConfirmation

      public void resendConfirmation(String email)
      Requests Supabase to resend the email-confirmation message.
      Parameters:
      email - Target email address.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the request fails.

    • getDisplayProfile

      public Optional<UserProfileResponse> getDisplayProfile(String email, String username)
      Retrieves a public profile by username.
      Parameters:
      email - Optional email filter (currently unused).
      username - The unique username to look up.
      Returns:
      Optional containing the public UserProfileResponse.

    • getAllUsers

      public List<Profile> getAllUsers()
      Returns every registered user profile.
      Returns:
      List of Profile entities.

    • getUserById

      public Optional<Profile> getUserById(UUID id)
      Retrieves a profile by its primary key.
      Parameters:
      id - The profile UUID.
      Returns:
      Optional containing the Profile, or empty if not found.

    • updatePartOfUser

      public Profile updatePartOfUser(UUID id, Map<String,Object> updates)
      Applies a partial update to an existing profile.
      Parameters:
      id - UUID of the profile to update.
      updates - Map of field names to new values (supports "username", "phone").
      Returns:
      The updated Profile entity.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the profile does not exist.

    • resetPassword

      public void resetPassword(String email)
      Triggers a password-reset email via Supabase.
      Parameters:
      email - User email.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the request fails.

    • changePassword

      public void changePassword(UUID userId, String email, String currentPassword, String newPassword)
      Changes a user's password after verifying the current one.
      Parameters:
      userId - UUID of the user.
      email - User email.
      currentPassword - The existing password.
      newPassword - The desired new password.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the current password is invalid or the update fails.

    • deleteUser

      public void deleteUser(UUID id)
      Deletes a user both from Supabase Auth and the local database.
      Parameters:
      id - UUID of the user to remove.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the local profile is not found.
